title: 这条 prompt 通过详细的布局、颜色搭配和文案设计，非常适合用于中文市场的在线教育或培训课程推广，特别是针对年轻人的兴趣爱好和职业发展领域。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 通过详细的布局、颜色搭配和文案设计，非常适合用于中文市场的在线教育或培训课程推广，特别是针对年轻人的兴趣爱好和职业发展领域。
prompt_original: {"type": "2x2 grid of promotional banner ads", "theme": "{argument name=\"course theme\" default=\"Social Media Content Creation School\"}", "panels": [{"position": "top-left", "color_palette": "light blue and pink pastel gradient", "subject": "young woman smiling, resting chin on hand, smartphone and ring light in foreground", "typography": {"headline": "{argument name=\"top left headline\" default=\"発信を仕事に変える SNSスクール\"}", "subheadings": ["好きが、私の未来になる！", "クリエイター志望歓迎！"]}, "layout_elements": {"bullet_points_count": 3, "call_to_action_button": "pink button labeled '無料体験 >'"}}, {"position": "top-right", "color_palette": "deep blue and cyan geometric", "subject": "young man looking intently at a professional camera on a tripod with a ring light", "typography": {"headline": "{argument name=\"top right headline\" default=\"魅せる投稿が学べる\"}", "subheadings": ["企画・撮影・運用サポート"]}, "layout_elements": {"circular_icons_count": 3, "icon_types": ["lightbulb", "camera", "bar chart"], "call_to_action_button": "yellow button labeled '詳細はこちら >'"}}, {"position": "bottom-left", "color_palette": "soft beige and white aesthetic", "subject": "young woman looking thoughtfully to the side, mood board background", "typography": {"headline": "{argument name=\"bottom left headline\" default=\"自分の世界観を育てる\"}", "subheadings": ["あなたらしさが、一番の強みになる。", "SNSブランディング講座"]}, "layout_elements": {"horizontal_icons_count": 3, "icon_types": ["palette", "person", "heart"], "call_to_action_button": "pink button labeled '今すぐ見る >'"}}, {"position": "bottom-right", "color_palette": "vibrant pink and magenta pop design", "subject": "young woman smiling brightly, pointing at text, messy bun, smartphone on tripod", "typography": {"headline": "{argument name=\"bottom right headline\" default=\"好きな発信でファンをつくる\"}", "subheadings": ["実践型レッスン"]}, "layout_elements": {"bullet_points_count": 4, "call_to_action_button": "yellow button labeled '申し込む >'"}}]}
prompt_zh: {"type": "2x2网格的促销横幅广告", "theme": "{argument name='课程主题' default='社交媒体内容创作学校'}", "panels": [{"position": "左上", "color_palette": "浅蓝和粉色渐变", "subject": "年轻女性微笑着，手托下巴，前景有智能手机和环形灯", "typography": {"headline": "{argument name='左上标题' default='将发布变为职业 SNS学校'}", "subheadings": ["爱好成为我的未来！", "欢迎有志成为创作者的人！"]}, "layout_elements": {"bullet_points_count": 3, "call_to_action_button": "标有'免费体验 >'的粉红色按钮"}}, {"position": "右上", "color_palette": "深蓝色和青色几何图形", "subject": "年轻男性专注地看着三脚架上的专业相机和环形灯", "typography": {"headline": "{argument name='右上标题' default='学习吸引人的发布'}", "subheadings": ["策划・拍摄・运营支持"]}, "layout_elements": {"circular_icons_count": 3, "icon_types": ["灯泡", "相机", "条形图"], "call_to_action_button": "标有'详情请点击 >'的黄色按钮"}}, {"position": "左下", "color_palette": "柔和的米色和白色美学", "subject": "年轻女性侧头沉思，背景为情绪板", "typography": {"headline": "{argument name='左下标题' default='培养自己的世界观'}", "subheadings": ["你的独特性是最强的优势。", "SNS品牌建设课程"]}, "layout_elements": {"horizontal_icons_count": 3, "icon_types": ["调色板", "人物", "心"], "call_to_action_button": "标有'立即查看 >'的粉红色按钮"}}, {"position": "右下", "color_palette": "鲜艳的粉红色和洋红色流行设计", "subject": "年轻女性笑容灿烂，指向文字，扎着凌乱的发髻，三脚架上有智能手机", "typography": {"headline": "{argument name='右下标题' default='通过喜欢的发布吸引粉丝'}", "subheadings": ["实践型课程"]}, "layout_elements": {"bullet_points_count": 4, "call_to_action_button": "标有'申请 >'的黄色按钮"}}]}
